# Pore Casts

**Summary**: Creating a 3D replica of the pore system by dissolving the rock matrix.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-abdulghani|Abdulghani, 1992]] used pore casts to provide a three-dimensional image of the pore geometry in the Arab-D Limestone Member.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Pore casts give a three-dimensional image of the pore geometry, allowing for investigation of the nature and origin of the rock pore systems. ([[1992-abdulghani|Abdulghani, 1992, p. 49]])
